description: User who journals about learning piano and asks about music practice

memory_chunks.content: Started piano lessons last week. My teacher assigned me a simple C major scale and a short piece called 'Ode to Joy'. My fingers feel so stiff.
Practiced for 30 minutes today. The left hand and right hand coordination is really hard. I kept stopping to reset. Frustrated but not giving up.
Breakthrough today — I played through the whole piece without stopping! It was slow, but it was complete. My teacher said I'm making fast progress for a beginner.
Looking up Chopin nocturnes on YouTube. That's the kind of music I eventually want to play. Feels impossibly far away right now but I'm motivated.

query: How is my piano practice going and what am I working on?
